content: HomeDirectoryWest MidlandsListings are provided for professional reference only. PoliceStationRepUK.com does not verify availability, does not arrange attendance, and does not recommend or endorse any individual listed.West MidlandsPolice Station Representatives in West MidlandsFind accredited police station representatives covering all West Midlands Police custody suites. Available 24/7 for immediate attendance at Birmingham, Coventry, Wolverhampton and across the West Midlands.Search West Midlands RepsRegister as West Midlands Rep13+Registered West Midlands Representatives23+West Midlands Police Stations24/7Coverage AvailablePolice Station Representation in West MidlandsWest Midlands is England's second-largest metropolitan area, with West Midlands Police being the second-largest police force in England after the Met. WMP operates custody suites across Birmingham, Coventry, Wolverhampton, Dudley, Sandwell, Solihull and Walsall.All representatives listed state they hold current PSRAS accreditation through the Law Society.
